{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032017520035B946CAD235C283AE88"}"},"total":497},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7465516079382692633","common":{"comment_type":31,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"个人感觉这是我看过最好看的暗影同人，原作中暗影帅是帅，但也确实只顾着装逼，相信大部分人也觉得这部番少了点恋爱成分，那么大的后宫主角不要，而这本书真的完美填补了这点，该帅的时候帅甜的时候甜，真的挺爽的，看完暗影觉得不过瘾，完全不必二刷，这本书就是答案，这也是同人存在的意义啊！"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1738207423,"group_id":"7425307676113914904","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"无论如何，因为热爱","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N6RbrAKyurAC3Q1wZSkp6blDDI0RtdkRXNMl5fysSLk4","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/5d0dc83d6b324e719f951768be5c1532~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776531384&x-signature=QXu9iz4H9RJ0he223N440Kg0DJ0%3D","user_id":"4450470022876959","user_name":"罗利空"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"4450470022876959","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7425307676113914904","book_info":{"abstract":"穿越到影之实力者的世界，原本想替代暗影成为暗影庭院的主人，
但暗影实力过于变态，退而求次成为暗影庭院二把手
既然暗影沉迷扮猪不喜欢女孩子，那就由自己来
帮助阿尔法建立基地，
给贝塔讲睡前故事
教导伽玛赚取的方法。
驯服德尔塔
让伊普西龙重新自信，教导她钢琴。
协助伊塔研究科技
